headline: Expanding AI Footprint Lifts Moat Stocks
summary: The S&P 500 gained 5.26% in May, but leadership was narrow, with mega-cap tech driving most of the gain. Read more here.

headline: Is Estée Lauder (EL) Facing a Governance Turning Point That Could Reframe Its Earnings Story?
summary: In early June 2026, Halper Sadeh LLC announced it is investigating whether certain officers and directors of The Estée Lauder Companies breached their fiduciary duties to shareholders, potentially prompting legal or governance actions. This legal scrutiny puts the company’s corporate governance practices under the spotlight, which can influence investor confidence and expectations around board oversight and accountability. We’ll now examine how this governance investigation might affect...
